title: SimpleSpawnCommand
body:
SimpleSpawnCommand is a lightweight spawn management plugin for Paper servers. Perfect for survival, lobby, or hub setups where you want players to quickly get to spawn and keep things simple.

Features:
- /spawn command to teleport players to the server spawn
- /setspawn to set the current location as the global spawn
- Optional teleport-on-join to send players to spawn when they join
- Clean, customizable messages with color codes (&)
- Works out of the box with sensible defaults
- Built for Paper 1.21+

## Permissions
- simplespawncommand.spawn — Use /spawn (default: true)
- simplespawncommand.setspawn — Use /setspawn (default: op)
- simplespawncommand.reload — Reload config (default: op)
- simplespawncommand.admin — Full access (default: op; includes spawn, setspawn, reload)

## Commands
- /spawn - Teleport to spawn
- /setspawn - Set current location as the server spawn
- /simplespawn - Show plugin info
- /simplespawn reload - Reload the configuration
